channel.title: Histories on DAMI LAB
channel.description: Recent content in Histories on DAMI LAB

item.title: 연구실 졸업생 Christoph Timmermann 학생
item.description: Technical University of Munich와 Audi가 협동하여 운영하는 박사과정에 합격했습니다.

item.title: 연구실 논문 “CaddieSet: A Golf Swing Dataset with Human Joint Features and Ball Information”
item.description: 11th International Workshop on Computer Vision in Sports (CVsports) at CVPR 2025에 게재되었습니다.

item.title: 연구실 논문 “Towards undetectable adversarial attack on time series classification”
item.description: Information Sciences(SCIE, JCR Q1, IF: 8.2)에 게재되었습니다.

item.title: 연구실 논문 “LM-CLIP: Adapting Positive Asymmetric Loss for Long-Tailed Multi-Label Classification”
item.description: IEEE Access(SCIE, JCR Q2, IF: 3.6)에 게재되었습니다.

item.title: 연구실 논문 “Interconnected dynamics of sustainable cryptocurrencies: Insights from transfer entropy analysis”
item.description: Finance Research Letters(SSCI, JCR Q1, IF: 7.4, JCR Top 1%)에 게재되었습니다.

item.title: 연구실 논문 “Black-box adversarial examples via frequency distortion against fault diagnosis systems”
item.description: Applied Soft Computing(SCIE, JCR Q1, IF: 7.2, JCR Top 10%)에 게재되었습니다.
